identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Hard', Advanced, Modern Smart Parking App for Mumbai that feels like a high-end mobility tool (Uber/Google Maps quality).
principles: The Map is the Canvas - UI floats above it.
Motion is Meaning - Transitions explain spatial relationships.
Density with Clarity - Show 100 slots without clutter.
Context-Aware - Bottom sheets adapt to what the user selects.

headings.usage: Use for all titles, prices, and major data points.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, addresses, and lists.

mono.usage: Use for slot numbers (e.g., A-102) and license plates.

primary.description: Indigo 600 - Digital, Modern, Trustworthy. Use for Primary CTAs and Active States.

secondary.description: Emerald 500 - Critical for 'AVAILABLE' slots and Success states.

destructive.description: Red 500 - Critical for 'OCCUPIED' slots and Errors.

accent.description: Slate 50 - Backgrounds for cards to ensure legibility.

muted.description: Slate 500 - For secondary text and icons.

layout_strategy.structure: Full-screen Map (z-0) + Floating HUD (z-10) + Bottom Sheet (z-20)

map.marker_style: Custom divIcon with pricing bubble or simple dot. Active marker scales up.

bottom_sheet.visuals: Rounded-t-3xl, bg-white, heavy shadow (shadow-[0_-8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]), drag handle pill at top.

slot_picker.visuals: Grid gap-2 or gap-3. Slots are rounded squares or pills. 'Screen' area represents Entrance.
slot_picker.interaction: Tap to select. Multi-select allowed if booking multiple? (Assume single for now).
slot_picker.legend: Must include sticky legend at top: Available, Occupied, Selected.

motion.transitions: Spring physics (stiffness: 300, damping: 30) for sheet movements.
motion.micro_interactions: Scale button on press (0.95). Slot scales up on selection.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use generic 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Manrope'.
Do NOT make the map secondary. It is the background of the entire app.
Ensure 'Available' slots are GREEN and 'Occupied' are RED. This is a universal mental model.
Mock the ESP32 data with a realistic interval (e.g., updates every 5 seconds).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Leaflet map with CartoDB Voyager tiles (cleanest for light mode).
2. Build the 'SlotBooking' component as a CSS Grid. It should look like a movie theatre seat picker.
3. Implement the Bottom Sheet using Framer Motion. It should be persistent (always there) and expandable.
4. Mock Firestore/ESP32 data structure: Collection 'parking_lots' -> Document -> Subcollection 'slots'.
5. Ensure the design is Mobile-First. Test heavily on narrow viewports.
